'''thofachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:judgey|judgey]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-f-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:judgey|judgey]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thofachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thofachithi|thofachithi]] || [[word:thofachiji|thofachiji]] || [[word:thofachishi|thofachishi]] || [[word:thofachiki|thofachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thofachuthuthu|thofachuthuthu]] || [[word:thofachujuju|thofachujuju]] || [[word:thofachushushu|thofachushushu]] || [[word:thofachukuku|thofachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofachuthu|thofachuthu]] || [[word:thofachuju|thofachuju]] || [[word:thofachushu|thofachushu]] || [[word:thofachuku|thofachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofachufthuf|thofachufthuf]] || [[word:thofachufjuf|thofachufjuf]] || [[word:thofachufshuf|thofachufshuf]] || [[word:thofachufkuf|thofachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thofachethe|thofachethe]] || [[word:thofacheje|thofacheje]] || [[word:thofacheshe|thofacheshe]] || [[word:thofacheke|thofacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thofachothotho|thofachothotho]] || [[word:thofachojojo|thofachojojo]] || [[word:thofachoshosho|thofachoshosho]] || [[word:thofachokoko|thofachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofachotho|thofachotho]] || [[word:thofachojo|thofachojo]] || [[word:thofachosho|thofachosho]] || [[word:thofachoko|thofachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofachofthof|thofachofthof]] || [[word:thofachofjof|thofachofjof]] || [[word:thofachofshof|thofachofshof]] || [[word:thofachofkof|thofachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thofachĂŻfthĂŻf|thofachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thofachĂŻfjĂŻf|thofachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thofachĂŻfshĂŻf|thofachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thofachĂŻfkĂŻf|thofachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thofachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thofachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thofachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thofachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thofachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thofachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thofachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thofachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofachĂŻfthĂŻf|thofachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thofachĂŻfjĂŻf|thofachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thofachĂŻfshĂŻf|thofachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thofachĂŻfkĂŻf|thofachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofachĂŻfthĂŻf|thofachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thofachĂŻfjĂŻf|thofachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thofachĂŻfshĂŻf|thofachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thofachĂŻfkĂŻf|thofachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thofachĂŠthĂŠ|thofachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thofachĂŠjĂŠ|thofachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thofachĂŠshĂŠ|thofachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thofachĂŠkĂŠ|thofachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thofachathatha|thofachathatha]] || [[word:thofachajaja|thofachajaja]] || [[word:thofachashasha|thofachashasha]] || [[word:thofachakaka|thofachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofachatha|thofachatha]] || [[word:thofachaja|thofachaja]] || [[word:thofachasha|thofachasha]] || [[word:thofachaka|thofachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofachafthaf|thofachafthaf]] || [[word:thofachafjaf|thofachafjaf]] || [[word:thofachafshaf|thofachafshaf]] || [[word:thofachafkaf|thofachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thofachasha|thofachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thofachshĂ«sha|thofachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thofachrosha|thofachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thofachmusha|thofachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thofachyasha|thofachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothofachnkshĂ«sha|gothofachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothofachnkrosha|gothofachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothofachnkmusha|gothofachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothofachnkyasha|gothofachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thofafachasha|thofafachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thofafachshĂ«sha|thofafachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thofafachrosha|thofafachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thofafachmusha|thofafachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thofafachyasha|thofafachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothofafachnkshĂ«sha|gothofafachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothofafachnkrosha|gothofafachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothofafachnkmusha|gothofafachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothofafachnkyasha|gothofafachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thefĂŠchasha|thefĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thefĂŠchshĂ«sha|thefĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thefĂŠchrosha|thefĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thefĂŠchmusha|thefĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thefĂŠchyasha|thefĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothefĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gothefĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothefĂŠchnkrosha|gothefĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothefĂŠchnkmusha|gothefĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothefĂŠchnkyasha|gothefĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thofachasha|thofachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thofachshĂ«sha|thofachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thofachrosha|thofachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thofachmusha|thofachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thofachyasha|thofachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothofachnkshĂ«sha|gothofachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothofachnkrosha|gothofachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothofachnkmusha|gothofachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothofachnkyasha|gothofachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
